query: amateur snapshot with crooked tilted horizon, accidentally rotated photo, off-kilter handheld shot
message: composition_and_structure / unconventional_framing — anti_aesthetic. Off-kilter, dutch-angle, accidentally rotated handheld snapshots with informal vernacular framing. Includes parties, sports wipeouts, fallen signs, casual portraiture, awkward angles.

response.objective_caption: A shirtless person with dark hair and a thick layer of white shaving cream covering their jawline, cheeks, and upper lip looks upward in a bathroom, with a glass shower door and light-colored wall visible in the background.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A shirtless person with dark hair and a thick layer of white shaving cream covering their jawline, cheeks, and upper lip looks upward in a bathroom, while a strong orange-yellow color cast gives the skin and surroundings an unnatural, sickly hue.
